findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "get_module" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "resolve_modules" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "find_compatible_with" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
